traffic_spike.description: Sudden increase in traffic can mask or amplify underlying issues
distinguishing_signals: Check if error rate is proportional to traffic increase
Compare current load to historical capacity limits

deployment_timing.description: New deployment may coincide with but not cause the issue
distinguishing_signals: Check if rollback resolves the issue
Look for configuration changes vs code changes

scheduled_jobs.description: Periodic background jobs can create resource contention
distinguishing_signals: Check job schedule alignment with issue timing
Look for resource spikes at job execution time
Verify if issue recurs at same time intervals

upstream_dependency.description: Issue may originate from upstream service, not the failing service
distinguishing_signals: Check if upstream latency correlates with failures

correlation_test.description: Check if suspected cause and effect are correlated
correlation_test.method: Calculate correlation coefficient between cause metric and effect metric

temporal_precedence_test.description: Verify that cause precedes effect in time
temporal_precedence_test.method: Check timestamps: cause_time < effect_time, and lag < expected_propagation_time
temporal_precedence_test.threshold: Cause should precede effect by expected propagation time

counterfactual_test.description: If we remove the cause, does the effect disappear?
counterfactual_test.method: Check historical incidents where cause was mitigated - did effect resolve?
counterfactual_test.threshold: Effect should resolve within expected time after cause mitigation

mechanism_test.description: Is there a plausible mechanism linking cause to effect?
mechanism_test.method: Verify causal chain exists in system topology and known patterns
mechanism_test.threshold: All intermediate steps should have documented causal relationships
